DISCOVERY, 302, MTN FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO THE WRITTEN DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. A COPY OF THIS ORDER WITH NOTICE OF ENTRY AND ALL WRITTEN DISCOVERY TO WHICH IT APPLIES SHALL BE SERVED ON THE PRO PER PLAINTIFF WHO WILL HAVE 35 DAYS AFTER SERVICE TO PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION. IF THE PLAINTIFF FAILS TO SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES THE MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTION MAY BE RENEWED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF IN THE SUM OF $360.00 WHICH SHALL BE PAID WITHIN 35 DAYS ALONG WITH PAYMENT OF THE PREVIOUS SANCTION AWARD OF $200. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

No appearances.

RULING: DEFENDANT ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY FOUNDATION,, ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY, ALAN FORD, STEPHENS INSTITUTE, Second Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanction; Alternatively For Further Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, And For Further Monetary Sanctions is granted as a result of Plaintiff's failure to comply with several prior court orders requiring responses to discovery. The request for additional monetary sanctions is denied. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
